TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == kakiliman == mubahelay balunga nu mitupinay tu tademaw ŤľČšļļť£õŤąĻ mubahelay balunga nu mitupinay tu tademaw u sapitupin tu tay-kung tademaw a tay-kun alubu, tungusay zumaay nu mitupinay tu sabahel i tapuku. mubahelay balunga nu mitupinay tu tademaw tadeng a midiput tu tademaw nu tay-kung i likut nu tay-kung mikawaw tu mubalelay a hikuki apanukay i sasa, u kinacacayay micukaymas nu panukasay mitupinay tu tademaw nu tay-kung a satupin. . nilaculan kakalayanay nu mubahelay a balung taneng tataytay mubahel, taneng mala u panukasay i lala' atu laed nu tay-kung-can "mitupunay" taneng henay atu tay-kung-can aca nu zuma nu mitupinay tut ay-kung miala tu mubahelay nu lyen-he-kow. mubahelay balunga nu kakalayan adidi' ku sapazedngan, acaay kaydah ku nipitupin tu sapawpes tu uud, acaay tu pabeli, sakasa caay tu kamuliyaw micukaymas. imahini, bey-ling-haw tay-kung balaunga tusa bangngu, sin-ci-sabahel a zazan, miadupay tay-kung balunga, mung-cow mitupinay nu mubahelay balalung kapah muliyaw micukaymas. malaheci nu tademaw mibase tu saayaway nu mitupinay tu tademaw nu mibahelay balunga u nu makay ayzaway nu Su-lyen i 1961 a mihca 4 a bulad 12 a demiad mibase tu tung-bang cacay banggu, u nitupinan niza tut ay-kung a tademaw ci yu-li.cya-cya-lin mala u saayaway a tademaw i likisi nu tay-kung a tademaw. . 1961 a mihcaan katukuh 1972 a nihcaan Amelika milihiza milekakaw tu A-pow-low, I 1969 a mihca 7 a bulad 16 a demiad mikitadu tu A-pow-loe 11 a bangngu ku malaheci patayza i ya-ciw nu tademaw, mikacaway a tademaw ci Ni-al.A-mu-s-te-lang mala saayaway nu mizipaay i ye-ciw a tadesmaw. Cow-kow I 2003 a hihca 10 a bulad 15 a demiad malaheci miba-se tu saayaway nu mitupinay nu mubahelay balunga sen-cow 5 a banggu, taykung a tademaw ci Yang-li-wi mala u saayaway nu Cong-kow nu micumuday i tay-kung. duduc tu cayay kalecad a nikaniyul, ayza malaheci tum aba-se ku mibahelay balunga nu mitupina tu tdemaw hakay mapala u wi-sin nu mibahelay balunga nu mitupina tu tdemaw atu tabuladay nu mibahelay balunga nu mitupina tu tdemaw tusa a kasasuma. wi-sinay nu mibahelay balunga nu mitupina tu tdemaw mitaliyuk tu ti-ciw amuniyul, tabuladay nu mibahelay balunga nu mitupina tu tdemaw u mitupinay tu tabuladay nu tay-kung a tademaw. imahini migungkuw nay iza henay ku muculilay a bunac nu mibahelay balunga nu mitupina tu tdemaw. tung-bang 1 banggu "kamu nu E, Boctok-1" ayaway nu nabalucu'an nu Su-lyen tay-kung, u saayaway nu tademaw mikawaw tu mitupinay tu tademaw mubahelay nu tay-kung, 1961 a mihca 4 a bulad 12 a demiad miba-se tapabaw, ci Yu-li.cya-cya lin mala u saayaway nu micumuday ihekal nu tay-kung a tademaw, uyza sa u saayaway a tdemaw nu micumud tu zazan nu ti-ciw. tung-bang 1 banggu u ci Sye-al.Ke‚ÄĒlow-lyaw-bu atu ci Ke-li-mu.A-li-ye-wi-ci.Ke-li-mu-bu a niseykean. Yu-li.Ya-li-ke-ye-wi-cu-cya-ciya-lin "kamu nu E, –ģ—Ä–ł–Ļ –ź–Ľ–Ķ–ļ—Ā–Ķ–Ķ–≤–ł—á –ď–į–≥–į—Ä–ł–Ĺ masaLow-ma tu Yuriy Alekseyevich Gagarin, 1934 a mihca 3 a bulad 9 a demiad katuku 1968 a mihca 3 a bulad 27 a demiad", Su-lyen kungung taykung tademaw, Su-lyen sakakaay a sumanahay hitay nu pacililay tu hikuki, 1961 a mihca 4 a bulad 12 a demiad mala u saayaway nu micumuday i tay-kung a tademaw, i pidadebecad nu tay-kung maala ku kahenulay a paya nu zazan. ci cya-cya-lin mala u singanganay a tademaw i kitakit, yadah ku nikaalaan tu kungpay atu singangan aca, zuma pasu Su-ljyen nu satalakaway a kasenengan Su-lyen iyung a kawlah. . A-pow-low a lekakawa, " kamu nu Ing, Project Apollo" anca mala u sakawawan nu Apow-low, u Ameylika kanatal a hikukian atu tay-kung cing-su makay 1961 katukuh 1972 a mihcaan mikawaw tu mahiniay mitupinay tu tademaw a tay-kung, i 1960 a zidayan 10 a mihcaan, anngangan saicelang amilepun tu mitupinay tu tademaw tatukus nu ye-ciw atu lihalay pananukas i ti-ciw. 1969 a mihcaan, A-pow-low 11 banggu kakalayay mubahelay balunga malaheci tu ku nisabalucu'an, Ni-al.A-mu-s cwang mala u saayaway nu miemekay i hekay nu ti-ciw a tademaw. atalaayaw mikawaw i ye-ciway a ke-sye mizizaw mikinsaay, lalid asa msabalucu' ku A-pow-low katukuh 1970 a mihcaan tu saayaway. pulung tu nipalawpes tu kalisiw 250 iy'k ku kalisiw, "u aca tungusay 2018 a mihcaan tu 1530 iy'k 12 ku nipatayza tu tademaw i ye-ciw A-pu-low 11 bunggu "kamu nu Ingn Apollo 11" u saayaw tayza i ye-ciw a tademaw mikawaw tu mitupinay tu tademaw nu mubahelay i tay-kung, miculculay ci Ni-al.A-mu-s-cwang tayza i ye-ciw paculilay ci Pow-ze.Ay-te-lin misakaputay Amelika nu tayzaay i ye-ciw misakapt I 1969 a mihca 7 a bulad 20 a demiad 17 saculil mikacaw tu "ing banggu" tabulad "Lunar Module Eagle LM-5" tatukus hekal nu ye-ciw. 1969ŚĻī7śúą20śó•20śôā17ŚąÜšĻė"ť∑ĻŤôü"ÁôĽśúąŤČô(Lunar Module Eagle (LM-5))Śú®śúąŤ°®ŤĎóťôł. 6 a tatukian zikuz nu 39 a satulilan, ci A-mu-s-cwang I 7 a bulad 21 a demiad 2 a tatukian 65 a saculilan mala u saayaway nu tayzaay i hekal nu ye-ciw, 19 a saculilan mikilul tu ci Ay-te-lin. tatusa i hekal nu ye-ciw mikawaw pakal tu 135 a saculilan, 21.55 a daduy ku nisuped tu ba'tu nu ye-ciw pataluma' i ti-ciw. A-mu-s-cwang atu ci Ay-te-lin i pikawawan i hekal nu ye-ciw, miculcul tu paculilay ci May-ke.Ke-lin-s tataytay sa i Ke-lun-pi-ya banggu mikawaw atu miculculay "Command module Columbia CM-107" mitaliyu mubahel. sakakaay nu miculculay atu paculilay tayza I ye-ciw I hekal nu ye-ciw mipahanhan tu 21 a tatukian 36 a saculil, u icibangay katukuh I tukus "cin-hay a kitizaan" zuma satu mikacaw tu tayza I ye-ciw atu matatules tu "Ke-lun-pi-y bang". Yang-li-wi "1965 a mihca 6 a bulad 21 a demiad" lecuh i Cong-hwa-zen-min-kung-he-kow Lyaw-lin a kuwan suy-cung kuwan, kikayay a sayhu, tay-kung a tademaw. 2003 a mihca 10 a bulad 15 a demiad, ci Yang-li -wi mikacaw t usen-co-5 a banggu saayaway nu mubahelay balunga "u kinacacayay aca" micumud tut ay-kung. u saayaway ciniza milihiza tu nu Cong milekakawaay mubahelay i ten-kung Cong-kow mikawaw tu mitupinay tu tademaw micumuday i tay-kung a tademaw, u saayaway nu micumuday i tay-kung nu Cong-hwa-zen-min-kung-he-kow a tademaw.

nu ** a satur~…ĺir~…ĺan, ¶i a-mu-s- ¶waŇč i * a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad * a tatukian ** a sa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺan mar~…ĺa u saajawaj nu tajzaaj i ńß…ôkar~…ĺ nu j…ô- ¶iw, ** a sa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺan mikir~…ĺur~…ĺ tu ¶i aj-t…ô-r~…ĺin. tatusa i ńß…ôkar~…ĺ nu j…ô- ¶iw mikawaw pakar~…ĺ tu *** a sa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺan, **.** a daduj ku nisup…ôd tu ba Ē~ °tu nu j…ô- ¶iw patar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° i ti- ¶iw. a-mu-s- ¶waŇč atu ¶i aj-t…ô-r~…ĺin i pikawawan i ńß…ôkar~…ĺ nu j…ô- ¶iw, mi ¶ur~…ĺ ¶ur~…ĺ tu pa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺaj ¶i maj-k…ô.k…ô-r~…ĺin-s tatajtaj sa i k…ô-r~…ĺun-pi-ja baŇčgu mikawaw atu mi ¶ur~…ĺ ¶ur~…ĺaj " ¶ommand modur~…ĺ…ô ¶or~…ĺumbia ¶m-***" mitar~…ĺiju mubańß…ôr~…ĺ. sakakaaj nu mi ¶ur~…ĺ ¶ur~…ĺaj atu pa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺaj tajza i j…ô- ¶iw i ńß…ôkar~…ĺ nu j…ô- ¶iw mipańßanńßan tu ** a tatukian ** a sa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ, u i ¶ibaŇčaj katukuńß i tukus " ¶in-ńßaj a kitizaan" zuma satu mika ¶aw tu tajza i j…ô- ¶iw atu matatur~…ĺ…ôs tu "k…ô-r~…ĺun-pi-j baŇč". jaŇč-r~…ĺi-wi "**** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad" r~…ĺ…ô ¶uńß i ¶oŇč-ńßwa-z…ôn-min-kuŇč-ńß…ô-kow r~…ĺjaw-r~…ĺin a kuwan suj- ¶uŇč kuwan, kikajaj a sajńßu, taj-kuŇč a tad…ômaw. **** a mińß ¶a ** a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad, ¶i jaŇč-r~…ĺi -wi mika ¶aw t us…ôn- ¶o-* a baŇčgu saajawaj nu mubańß…ôr~…ĺaj bar~…ĺuŇča "u kina ¶a ¶ajaj a ¶a" mi ¶umud tut aj-kuŇč. u saajawaj ¶iniza mir~…ĺińßiza tu nu ¶oŇč mir~…ĺ…ôkakawaaj mubańß…ôr~…ĺaj i t…ôn-kuŇč ¶oŇč-kow mikawaw tu mitupinaj tu tad…ômaw mi ¶umudaj i taj-kuŇč a tad…ômaw, u saajawaj nu mi ¶umudaj i taj-kuŇč nu ¶oŇč-ńßwa-z…ôn-min-kuŇč-ńß…ô-kow a tad…ômaw.
S.FORM: == kakiliman == mubahelay balunga nu mitupinay tu tademaw ŤľČšļļť£õŤąĻ mubahelay balunga nu mitupinay tu tademaw u sapitupin tu tay-kung tademaw a tay-kun alubu, tungusay zumaay nu mitupinay tu sabahel i tapuku. mubahelay balunga nu mitupinay tu tademaw tadeng a midiput tu tademaw nu tay-kung i likut nu tay-kung mikawaw tu mubalelay a hikuki apanukay i sasa, u kinacacayay micukaymas nu panukasay mitupinay tu tademaw nu tay-kung a satupin. . nilaculan kakalayanay nu mubahelay a balung taneng tataytay mubahel, taneng mala u panukasay i lala' atu laed nu tay-kung-can "mitupunay" taneng henay atu tay-kung-can aca nu zuma nu mitupinay tut ay-kung miala tu mubahelay nu lyen-he-kow. mubahelay balunga nu kakalayan adidi' ku sapazedngan, acaay kaydah ku nipitupin tu sapawpes tu uud, acaay tu pabeli, sakasa caay tu kamuliyaw micukaymas. imahini, bey-ling-haw tay-kung balaunga tusa bangngu, sin-ci-sabahel a zazan, miadupay tay-kung balunga, mung-cow mitupinay nu mubahelay balalung kapah muliyaw micukaymas. malaheci nu tademaw mibase tu saayaway nu mitupinay tu tademaw nu mibahelay balunga u nu makay ayzaway nu Su-lyen i 1961 a mihca 4 a bulad 12 a demiad mibase tu tung-bang cacay banggu, u nitupinan niza tut ay-kung a tademaw ci yu-li.cya-cya-lin mala u saayaway a tademaw i likisi nu tay-kung a tademaw. . 1961 a mihcaan katukuh 1972 a nihcaan Amelika milihiza milekakaw tu A-pow-low, I 1969 a mihca 7 a bulad 16 a demiad mikitadu tu A-pow-loe 11 a bangngu ku malaheci patayza i ya-ciw nu tademaw, mikacaway a tademaw ci Ni-al.A-mu-s-te-lang mala saayaway nu mizipaay i ye-ciw a tadesmaw. Cow-kow I 2003 a hihca 10 a bulad 15 a demiad malaheci miba-se tu saayaway nu mitupinay nu mubahelay balunga sen-cow 5 a banggu, taykung a tademaw ci Yang-li-wi mala u saayaway nu Cong-kow nu micumuday i tay-kung. duduc tu cayay kalecad a nikaniyul, ayza malaheci tum aba-se ku mibahelay balunga nu mitupina tu tdemaw hakay mapala u wi-sin nu mibahelay balunga nu mitupina tu tdemaw atu tabuladay nu mibahelay balunga nu mitupina tu tdemaw tusa a kasasuma. wi-sinay nu mibahelay balunga nu mitupina tu tdemaw mitaliyuk tu ti-ciw amuniyul, tabuladay nu mibahelay balunga nu mitupina tu tdemaw u mitupinay tu tabuladay nu tay-kung a tademaw. imahini migungkuw nay iza henay ku muculilay a bunac nu mibahelay balunga nu mitupina tu tdemaw. tung-bang 1 banggu "kamu nu E, Boctok-1" ayaway nu nabalucu'an nu Su-lyen tay-kung, u saayaway nu tademaw mikawaw tu mitupinay tu tademaw mubahelay nu tay-kung, 1961 a mihca 4 a bulad 12 a demiad miba-se tapabaw, ci Yu-li.cya-cya lin mala u saayaway nu micumuday ihekal nu tay-kung a tademaw, uyza sa u saayaway a tdemaw nu micumud tu zazan nu ti-ciw. tung-bang 1 banggu u ci Sye-al.Ke‚ÄĒlow-lyaw-bu atu ci Ke-li-mu.A-li-ye-wi-ci.Ke-li-mu-bu a niseykean. Yu-li.Ya-li-ke-ye-wi-cu-cya-ciya-lin "kamu nu E, –ģ—Ä–ł–Ļ –ź–Ľ–Ķ–ļ—Ā–Ķ–Ķ–≤–ł—á –ď–į–≥–į—Ä–ł–Ĺ masaLow-ma tu Yuriy Alekseyevich Gagarin, 1934 a mihca 3 a bulad 9 a demiad katuku 1968 a mihca 3 a bulad 27 a demiad", Su-lyen kungung taykung tademaw, Su-lyen sakakaay a sumanahay hitay nu pacililay tu hikuki, 1961 a mihca 4 a bulad 12 a demiad mala u saayaway nu micumuday i tay-kung a tademaw, i pidadebecad nu tay-kung maala ku kahenulay a paya nu zazan. ci cya-cya-lin mala u singanganay a tademaw i kitakit, yadah ku nikaalaan tu kungpay atu singangan aca, zuma pasu Su-ljyen nu satalakaway a kasenengan Su-lyen iyung a kawlah. . A-pow-low a lekakawa, " kamu nu Ing, Project Apollo" anca mala u sakawawan nu Apow-low, u Ameylika kanatal a hikukian atu tay-kung cing-su makay 1961 katukuh 1972 a mihcaan mikawaw tu mahiniay mitupinay tu tademaw a tay-kung, i 1960 a zidayan 10 a mihcaan, anngangan saicelang amilepun tu mitupinay tu tademaw tatukus nu ye-ciw atu lihalay pananukas i ti-ciw. 1969 a mihcaan, A-pow-low 11 banggu kakalayay mubahelay balunga malaheci tu ku nisabalucu'an, Ni-al.A-mu-s cwang mala u saayaway nu miemekay i hekay nu ti-ciw a tademaw. atalaayaw mikawaw i ye-ciway a ke-sye mizizaw mikinsaay, lalid asa msabalucu' ku A-pow-low katukuh 1970 a mihcaan tu saayaway. pulung tu nipalawpes tu kalisiw 250 iy'k ku kalisiw, "u aca tungusay 2018 a mihcaan tu 1530 iy'k 12 ku nipatayza tu tademaw i ye-ciw A-pu-low 11 bunggu "kamu nu Ingn Apollo 11" u saayaw tayza i ye-ciw a tademaw mikawaw tu mitupinay tu tademaw nu mubahelay i tay-kung, miculculay ci Ni-al.A-mu-s-cwang tayza i ye-ciw paculilay ci Pow-ze.Ay-te-lin misakaputay Amelika nu tayzaay i ye-ciw misakapt I 1969 a mihca 7 a bulad 20 a demiad 17 saculil mikacaw tu "ing banggu" tabulad "Lunar Module Eagle LM-5" tatukus hekal nu ye-ciw. 1969ŚĻī7śúą20śó•20śôā17ŚąÜšĻė"ť∑ĻŤôü"ÁôĽśúąŤČô(Lunar Module Eagle (LM-5))Śú®śúąŤ°®ŤĎóťôł. 6 a tatukian zikuz nu 39 a satulilan, ci A-mu-s-cwang I 7 a bulad 21 a demiad 2 a tatukian 65 a saculilan mala u saayaway nu tayzaay i hekal nu ye-ciw, 19 a saculilan mikilul tu ci Ay-te-lin. tatusa i hekal nu ye-ciw mikawaw pakal tu 135 a saculilan, 21.55 a daduy ku nisuped tu ba'tu nu ye-ciw pataluma' i ti-ciw. A-mu-s-cwang atu ci Ay-te-lin i pikawawan i hekal nu ye-ciw, miculcul tu paculilay ci May-ke.Ke-lin-s tataytay sa i Ke-lun-pi-ya banggu mikawaw atu miculculay "Command module Columbia CM-107" mitaliyu mubahel. sakakaay nu miculculay atu paculilay tayza I ye-ciw I hekal nu ye-ciw mipahanhan tu 21 a tatukian 36 a saculil, u icibangay katukuh I tukus "cin-hay a kitizaan" zuma satu mikacaw tu tayza I ye-ciw atu matatules tu "Ke-lun-pi-y bang". Yang-li-wi "1965 a mihca 6 a bulad 21 a demiad" lecuh i Cong-hwa-zen-min-kung-he-kow Lyaw-lin a kuwan suy-cung kuwan, kikayay a sayhu, tay-kung a tademaw. 2003 a mihca 10 a bulad 15 a demiad, ci Yang-li -wi mikacaw t usen-co-5 a banggu saayaway nu mubahelay balunga "u kinacacayay aca" micumud tut ay-kung. u saayaway ciniza milihiza tu nu Cong milekakawaay mubahelay i ten-kung Cong-kow mikawaw tu mitupinay tu tademaw micumuday i tay-kung a tademaw, u saayaway nu micumuday i tay-kung nu Cong-hwa-zen-min-kung-he-kow a tademaw.
S.PHON: == kakir~…ĺiman == mubańß…ôr~…ĺaj bar~…ĺuŇča nu mitupinaj tu tad…ômaw **** mubańß…ôr~…ĺaj bar~…ĺuŇča nu mitupinaj tu tad…ômaw u sapitupin tu taj-kuŇč tad…ômaw a taj-kun ar~…ĺubu, tuŇčusaj ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ, u i ¶ibaŇčaj katukuńß i tukus " ¶in-ńßaj a kitizaan" zuma satu mika ¶aw tu tajza i j…ô- ¶iw atu matatur~…ĺ…ôs tu "k…ô-r~…ĺun-pi-j baŇč". jaŇč-r~…ĺi-wi "**** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad ** a ¶aw t us…ôn- ¶o-* a baŇčgu saajawaj nu mubańß…ôr~…ĺaj bar~…ĺuŇča "u kina ¶a ¶ajaj a ¶a" mi ¶umud tut aj-kuŇč. u saajawaj ¶iniza mir~…ĺińßiza tu nu ¶oŇč mir~…ĺ…ôkakawaaj mubańß…ôr~…ĺaj i t…ôn-kuŇč ¶oŇč-kow mikawaw tu mitupinaj tu tad…ômaw mi ¶umudaj i taj-kuŇč a tad…ômaw, u saajawaj nu mi ¶umudaj i taj-kuŇč nu ¶oŇč-ńßwa-z…ôn-min-kuŇč-ńß…ô-kow a tad…ômaw.
